title: BOSS Zhipin's Ongoing Share Repurchases Reach Over RMB1.48 Billion in 2026
description: BEIJING, May 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- KANZHUN LIMITED (“BOSS Zhipin” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: BZ; HK: 2076) today announced the continued execution of its share repurchase program, utilizing around RMB27.0 million to repurchase 600,854 ordinary shares on May 26, 2026. With this latest repurchase, the Company has made over RMB1.48 billion in share repurchases year-to-date in 2026. This effort underscores the Company's ongoing commitment to delivering value to shareholde
